text_original: so far it's a good experience, better than other AI apps
text_zh: 到目前为止，这是一次不错的体验，比其他AI应用更好。
reply_original: Thank you for your 5-star review! We're thrilled you're enjoying Fantasia. Your support fuels our passion to create even more magical moments. If you ever need help, just let us know—we're here to make your experience unforgettable!
reply_zh: 感谢您的五星评价！我们欣喜不已，您享受Fantasia的样子让我们感到非常开心。您的支持激发了我们创造更多魔幻时刻的热情。如果您有任何需要帮助的地方，随时告诉我们——我们将竭诚为您打造难以忘怀的体验！
